name: @radzor/llm-completion
description: Universal LLM completion client supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, and Ollama. Provides chat completions, streaming, conversation history, and automatic retries with exponential backoff.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.description: API key for the provider. Required for openai and anthropic, optional for ollama.

inputs.name: baseUrl
inputs.description: Override the API base URL. Useful for proxies or self-hosted instances.

inputs.name: maxTokens
inputs.description: Maximum tokens to generate in the response.

inputs.name: systemPrompt
inputs.description: System prompt prepended to all conversations.

outputs.name: completionResult
outputs.description: The full completion response including content, usage stats, and finish reason.

events.name: onChunk
events.description: Fired for each streamed token. done=true signals the stream is complete.

events.name: onComplete
events.description: Fired when a completion (streamed or non-streamed) finishes.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired when an API call fails after all retries.

actions.name: complete
actions.description: Send a prompt and get a complete response. Adds to conversation history.

actions.name: stream
actions.description: Send a prompt and stream the response token by token via onChunk events.

actions.name: setSystemPrompt
actions.description: Set or update the system prompt for future completions.

llm.constraints: Requires an API key for OpenAI and Anthropic. Ollama requires a local instance running. Uses the native fetch API (Node.js 18+ or browser).
